current_markdown:
# Requirement Brief

## Goal
Provide a new feature that calculates loan duration based on monthly rate, loan amount, and interest rate.

## Business Context
This is a quality-of-life improvement for customers, helping them understand loan terms more easily and improving the overall loan application experience. It also supports internal staff by providing a consistent calculation capability.

## Users
- Customers
- Internal staff

## Functional Requirements
- The system must calculate loan duration using the existing loan calculator logic, adapted to the new use case.
- The feature must accept monthly rate, loan amount, and interest rate as inputs.
- The feature must return the calculated loan duration to customers and internal staff.

## Non-Functional Requirements
- Security

## Risks and Dependencies
- No known risks or dependencies identified at this time.

## Open Questions
- None at the moment
